args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort AS aasIdShort, aas.id AS aasId, sm.idShort AS smIdShort, sm.id AS smId, sc.id AS semanticId
ORDER BY aasIdShort, smIdShort

args.name: Hierarchical Structures enabling Bills of Material

args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall3'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'HierarchicalStructures'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(e:Entity)
WHERE e:Entity
RETURN e.idShort, e.smId, labels(e) AS types

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['UR20_001', 'MiR250_002', 'UR3e_001', 'MiR250_001']
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, a.globalAssetId, a.assetType

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: $aasId})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'Nameplate'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['manufacturer', 'model', 'serialNumber', 'productName']
RETURN p.idShort, p.value
ORDER BY p.idShort

args.name: Digital nameplate

tool_calls.name: query_aas_graph

args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'Nameplate'})
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['UR20_001', 'MiR250_001', 'MiR250_002', 'UR3e_001']
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(mlp)
WHERE m:MultiLanguageProperty AND mlp.idShort = 'ManufacturerProductDesignation'
MATCH (mlp)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(lv:LangString)
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, lv.text AS productDesignation

tool_calls.result_preview: {"error":"{neo4j_code: Neo.ClientError.Statement.SyntaxError} {message: Variable `m` not defined (line 4, column 7 (offset: 205))\n\"WHERE m:MultiLanguageProperty AND mlp.idShort = 'ManufacturerProduc

args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'Nameplate'})
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['UR20_001', 'MiR250_001', 'MiR250_002', 'UR3e_001']
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(mlp:MultiLanguageProperty)
WHERE mlp.idShort = 'ManufacturerProductDesignation'
MATCH (mlp)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(lv:LangString)
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, lv.text AS productDesignation
ORDER BY device

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'Nameplate'})
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['UR20_001', 'MiR250_001', 'MiR250_002', 'UR3e_001']
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE el.idShort IN ['ManufacturerProductDesignation', 'ManufacturerProductType', 'SerialNumber', 'ManufacturerName']
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, el.idShort AS property, el.value AS value
ORDER BY device, property

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'Nameplate'})
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['UR20_001', 'MiR250_001', 'MiR250_002', 'UR3e_001']
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(mlp:MultiLanguageProperty)
MATCH (mlp)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(lv:LangString)
WHERE mlp.idShort IN ['ManufacturerProductDesignation', 'ManufacturerName', 'ManufacturerProductType']
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, mlp.idShort AS property, lv.text AS value
ORDER BY device, property

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'Nameplate'})
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['UR20_001', 'MiR250_001', 'MiR250_002', 'UR3e_001']
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, el.idShort AS property, el.value AS value, labels(el) AS types
ORDER BY device, property

tool_calls.result_preview:
# Cypher patterns and anti-patterns

`get_templates_index()` (verbatim semanticIds) before composing any

args.cypher:
// Find all submodels with their semanticIds to understand what's in the graph
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN DISTINCT sc.id AS semanticId
ORDER BY semanticId

// Find FacilityInformation submodels and their AAS shells
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})
RETURN aas.idShort AS aasIdShort, aas.id AS aasId, sm.idShort AS smIdShort, sm.id AS smId

args.name: FacilityInformation
Hierarchical Structures enabling Bills of Material

args.cypher:
// Find all HierarchicalStructures submodels and their parent AAS
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/HierarchicalStructures/1/1/Submodel'})
RETURN aas.idShort AS aasIdShort, aas.id AS aasId, sm.idShort AS smIdShort, sm.id AS smId

// Find all HierarchicalStructures submodels and their parent AAS - without the /Submodel suffix
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/HierarchicalStructures/1/1'})
RETURN aas.idShort AS aasIdShort, aas.id AS aasId, sm.idShort AS smIdShort, sm.id AS smId

tool_calls.name: query_aas_graph

args.cypher:
// Discover actual semanticIds in graph that mention Hierarchical
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
WHERE toLower(sc.id) CONTAINS 'hierarch'
RETURN DISTINCT sc.id AS semanticId, sm.idShort AS smIdShort

tool_calls.result_preview: {"error":"forbidden_pattern","violations":[{"rule":"toLower_id_contains","hint":"Use exact match instead: WHERE aas.idShort = 'ExactName'. See cypher.md anti-pattern #4.","match":"toLower(sc.id) CONTA

args.cypher:
// List all submodels and their semanticIds to find the Hierarchical one
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort AS aasIdShort, sm.idShort AS smIdShort, sc.id AS semanticId

// Explore the Entity tree in Hall3's HierarchicalStructures submodel
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall3'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'HierarchicalStructures'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(e:Entity)
RETURN e.idShort AS entity_idShort, e.smId AS smId, labels(e) AS labels

// Find devices in Hall3 via the HierarchicalStructures Entity tree
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall3'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'HierarchicalStructures'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(entry:Entity {idShort: 'EntryNode'})
MATCH (entry)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(child:Entity)
OPTIONAL MATCH (child)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
WHERE child.idShort <> 'EntryNode'
RETURN child.idShort AS deviceId, asset.globalAssetId AS globalAssetId, asset.assetKind AS assetKind

// Get the AAS details for each device found in Hall3
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE a.globalAssetId IN ['urn:asset:ur20:001', 'urn:asset:mir250:002', 'urn:asset:ur3e:001', 'urn:asset:mir250:001']
RETURN aas.idShort AS deviceName, a.globalAssetId, aas.id AS aasId
ORDER BY deviceName

// Get nameplate info for devices in Hall3 to identify their types
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate'})
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['MiR250_001', 'MiR250_002', 'UR20_001', 'UR3e_001']
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['Manufacturer', 'Model', 'SerialNumber']
RETURN aas.idShort AS deviceName, p.idShort AS propName, p.value AS propValue
ORDER BY deviceName, propName

tool_calls.name: get_manual_page
tool_calls.result_preview:
# Cypher patterns and anti-patterns

**Pre-condition.** Call `get_graph_schema()` (relationship labels) and
`get_templates_index()` (verbatim semanticIds) before composing any
Cypher. Invented labels

tool_calls.name: get_graph_schema
tool_calls.result_preview:
# AAS Graph Schema

All nodes also carry the label `GraphNode`.

## Core Nodes

### AssetAdministrationShell
The top-level AAS entity.
- Labels: AssetAdministrationShell, Identifiable, Referable, Refe

args.name: FacilityInformation
Hierarchical Structures enabling Bills of Material

args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'FacilityInformation'
RETURN aas.idShort AS aasIdShort, aas.id AS aasId, sm.id AS smId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: $aasId})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS templateSemanticId

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: $smId})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(e:Entity)
WHERE e.entityType IS NOT NULL
RETURN e.idShort, e.entityType, e.smId

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: $smId})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(e:Entity)
OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE e.idShort <> 'EntryNode'
RETURN e.idShort AS entityIdShort, a.globalAssetId, a.assetKind, a.assetType

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE a.globalAssetId IN $globalAssetIds
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_DISPLAY_NAME]->(dn:LangString)
RETURN aas.idShort, a.globalAssetId, dn.text AS displayName

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: $idShort})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['Manufacturer', 'Model', 'Type']
RETURN p.idShort, p.value

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: $idShort})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
RETURN p.idShort, p.value

args.name: Digital nameplate

args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: $idShort})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(mlp:MultiLanguageProperty)
WHERE mlp.idShort = 'ManufacturerName'
MATCH (mlp)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(ls:LangString)
RETURN ls.text AS manufacturer

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: $idShort})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE el.idShort IN ['ManufacturerName', 'ManufacturerProductType', 'ManufacturerProductDesignation']
RETURN el.idShort, el.smId, labels(el) AS types

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE a.globalAssetId IN $globalAssetIds
MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort, a.globalAssetId, sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS semanticId
ORDER BY aas.idShort, sm.idShort

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: $idShort})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sc.id AS semanticId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE a.globalAssetId IN $globalAssetIds
MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['ManufacturerProductType', 'SerialNumber', 'YearOfConstruction', 'OrderCodeOfManufacturer', 'ProductArticleNumberOfManufacturer', 'UniqueFacilityIdentifier']
AND p.value IS NOT NULL AND p.value <> ''
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, p.idShort AS field, p.value AS value
ORDER BY device, field

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: $smId})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.value IS NOT NULL AND p.value <> ''
RETURN p.idShort, p.value

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: $smId})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(mlp:MultiLanguageProperty)
MATCH (mlp)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(ls:LangString)
RETURN mlp.idShort, ls.text, ls.language

tool_calls.name: get_graph_schema
tool_calls.result_preview:
# AAS Graph Schema

All nodes also carry the label `GraphNode`.

## Core Nodes

### AssetAdministrationShell
The top-level AAS entity.
- Labels: AssetAdministrationShell, Identifiable, Referable, Refe

args.cypher:
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN DISTINCT sc.id AS semanticId
ORDER BY semanticId

args.name: FacilityInformation

args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort IS NOT NULL
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort AS aasIdShort, aas.id AS aasId, sm.idShort AS smIdShort, sc.id AS semanticId
ORDER BY aasIdShort

args.name: Hierarchical Structures enabling Bills of Material

args.cypher:
MATCH (hall:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall3'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'HierarchicalStructures'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(e:Entity)
WHERE e.entityType IS NOT NULL
OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:HAS_SPECIFIC_ASSET_ID]->(sai:SpecificAssetId)
RETURN e.idShort AS entityIdShort, e.entityType, a.globalAssetId AS globalAssetId, sai.value AS specificAssetIdValue
ORDER BY e.idShortPath

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE a.globalAssetId IN ['urn:asset:mir250:001', 'urn:asset:mir250:002', 'urn:asset:ur20:001', 'urn:asset:ur3e:001']
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort = 'FamilyName'
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas2:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm2:Submodel)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p2:Property)
WHERE p2.idShort = 'Model' AND sm2.id = sm.id
RETURN aas.idShort AS deviceName, a.globalAssetId, p.value AS familyName, p2.value AS model

args.name: Digital nameplate

args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['MiR250_001', 'MiR250_002', 'UR20_001', 'UR3e_001']
  AND sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(mlp:MultiLanguageProperty)
WHERE mlp.idShort = 'ManufacturerProductDesignation'
MATCH (mlp)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(ls:LangString)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort = 'SerialNumber'
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, ls.text AS productDesignation, p.value AS serialNumber
ORDER BY aas.idShort

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'MiR250_001'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE el.idShort IS NOT NULL
RETURN el.idShort, labels(el) AS types, el.value
ORDER BY el.idShortPath

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'MiR250_001'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(mlp:MultiLanguageProperty)
MATCH (mlp)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(ls:LangString)
RETURN mlp.idShort, ls.language, ls.text

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'MiR250_001'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN el.idShort, labels(el) AS types

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['MiR250_001', 'MiR250_002', 'UR20_001', 'UR3e_001']
  AND sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort = 'SerialNumber'
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, p.value AS serialNumber, aas.id AS aasId
ORDER BY aas.idShort

MATCH (instance:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:DERIVED_FROM]->(type:AssetAdministrationShell)
WHERE instance.idShort IN ['MiR250_001', 'MiR250_002', 'UR20_001', 'UR3e_001']
RETURN instance.idShort AS device, type.idShort AS typeShell
ORDER BY instance.idShort

MATCH (type:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE type.idShort IN ['MiR250_Type', 'UR20_Type', 'UR3e_Type']
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IS NOT NULL
RETURN type.idShort AS typeShell, sm.idShort AS submodel, p.idShort, p.value
ORDER BY type.idShort, sm.idShort, p.idShort

args.cypher:
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm)
RETURN aas.idShort AS hallName, aas.id AS aasId, sm.idShort AS smIdShort, sm.id AS smId

args.name: FacilityInformation

args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:hall3'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS templateSemanticId

args.name: Hierarchical Structures enabling Bills of Material

args.cypher:
MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall3:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(e:Entity)
WHERE e.idShort = 'Node'
RETURN e.idShort, e.idShortPath, e.smId

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall3:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN el.idShort, el.idShortPath, labels(el) AS types, el.smId

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall3:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(:Entity)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(child:Entity)
OPTIONAL MATCH (child)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
OPTIONAL MATCH (child)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(nameplate:Property)
WHERE nameplate.idShort = 'Nameplate' OR nameplate.idShort = 'AssetID'
RETURN child.idShort AS device, asset.globalAssetId AS globalAssetId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE a.globalAssetId IN ['urn:asset:mir250:001', 'urn:asset:ur3e:001', 'urn:asset:mir250:002', 'urn:asset:ur20:001']
RETURN aas.idShort, a.globalAssetId

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: "urn:submodel:hall3:hierarchicalstructures"})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(entry:Entity {idShort: "EntryNode"})

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: "urn:submodel:hall3:hierarchicalstructures"})

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: "urn:submodel:hall3:hierarchicalstructures"})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(entry:Entity {idShort: "EntryNode"})
MATCH (entry)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(hasPart:RelationshipElement {idShort: "HasPart"})
MATCH (hasPart)-[:HAS_SECOND]->(ref)
RETURN ref.idShort, ref.value

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: "urn:submodel:hall3:hierarchicalstructures"})

WHERE el.idShort IN ['UR20_001', 'MiR250_002', 'UR3e_001', 'MiR250_001']

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: "urn:submodel:hall3:hierarchicalstructures"})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(entry:Entity {idShort: "EntryNode"})
MATCH (entry)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(child)
RETURN child.idShort, labels(child) AS types

result.query: Which devices are located in Hall 3?
result.response:
I need to find devices located in Hall 3. Let me start by understanding the graph structure and templates available.









I see there's a "FacilityInformation" template and a "Data Model for Asset Location" template. Let me also check the Cypher manual and then look for halls in the graph.









Now let me find halls/facilities in the graph. I'll look for submodels with the FacilityInformation template and also check for any "HierarchicalStructures" which might represent organizational structures like halls.









I found Hall 3. Now I need to find the devices located in Hall 3. Let me look at the FacilityInformation submodel structure and also check for HierarchicalStructures which might list contained assets.









The FacilityInformation template only has basic hall info, not a list of contained devices. Let me check if Hall 3 has a HierarchicalStructures submodel that lists contained assets.









Hall 3 has a HierarchicalStructures submodel. Let me look at its template structure and then traverse it to find contained devices.









Now I understand the structure. The HierarchicalStructures submodel has an EntryNode Entity with nested Node Entities, connected via HasPart relationships. Let me traverse this to find all devices in Hall 3.









No direct REPRESENTS_ASSET links. Let me look at the full structure of the HierarchicalStructures submodel more broadly.









I found 4 device entities in Hall 3: UR20_001, MiR250_002, UR3e_001, and MiR250_001. Let me check if these entities have asset representations or linked AAS shells.









I found the 4 devices. Now let me find their AAS shells to get more human-readable names and details.









Let me also check what type of devices these are by looking at their submodels (e.g., technical data, nameplate).









Let me get the nameplate details (manufacturer, model) for each device to provide more useful information.

















Let me get all properties from the nameplate to understand the device types better.









The nameplate doesn't have manufacturer or model fields populated. Let me check if these devices have Technical Data submodels or if the AAS IDs themselves give clues about device types. Let me also check if there's an AGV technical data submodel (since MiR250 are known AGVs).









Let me also check if these devices have type shells with more detailed information (e.g., AGV technical data).









Let me check the type shells for technical data about device categories.

























Now I have a clear picture. Let me get some technical details from the AGV technical data submodel for the MiR250s and from the Technical Data submodels for the UR robots.

















Good. Now I have all the information I need. Here's the answer:

---

**Hall 3 contains 4 devices:**

1. **MiR250_001** — Mobile Robot (AGV Carrier)
   - Type: MiR250 (Mobile Industrial Robot)
   - Serial: MIR250-2023-001
   - Max load: 250 kg, Laser SLAM navigation

2. **MiR250_002** — Mobile Robot (AGV Carrier)
   - Type: MiR250 (Mobile Industrial Robot)
   - Serial: MIR250-2023-002
   - Same specs as MiR250_001

3. **UR20_001** — Collaborative Robot Arm
   - Type: UR20 (Universal Robots)
   - Serial: UR20-2024-001

4. **UR3e_001** — Collaborative Robot Arm
   - Type: UR3e (Universal Robots)
   - Serial: UR3E-2024-001

**Summary:** 2 AGVs (MiR250 carriers) and 2 collaborative robot arms (UR20 and UR3e).

Source: Graph data from the HierarchicalStructures submodel of Hall 3 and type shell technical data.

MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)

ORDER BY device

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE a.globalAssetId IN ['urn:asset:ur20:001', 'urn:asset:mir250:002', 'urn:asset:ur3e:001', 'urn:asset:mir250:001']
MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, sm.idShort, sc.id AS templateSemanticId
ORDER BY device, sm.idShort

args.cypher:
// Find all submodels conforming to the AGV technical data template
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/SubmodelTemplate/technicaldataagv/1/0'})
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm)
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
RETURN aas.idShort AS aasIdShort, aas.id AS aasId, a.globalAssetId AS globalAssetId, a.assetType AS assetType

// Find all instance shells derived from AGV type shells
MATCH (instance:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:DERIVED_FROM]->(type:AssetAdministrationShell)
WHERE type.idShort IN ['MiR100_Type', 'MiR250_Type']
OPTIONAL MATCH (instance)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
RETURN instance.idShort AS instanceIdShort, instance.id AS instanceId, type.idShort AS typeIdShort, a.globalAssetId AS globalAssetId

args.name: Technical Data for Automated Guided Vehicles

args.cypher:
// List all submodels on each AGV instance with their semanticIds
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['MiR100_001', 'MiR250_001', 'MiR250_002']
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort AS instanceIdShort, sm.idShort AS submodelIdShort, sm.id AS submodelId, sc.id AS semanticId
ORDER BY instanceIdShort, submodelIdShort

// Search for any submodels related to location across all shells
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/smt/assetlocation/1/0'})
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm)
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, sm.idShort, sm.id

tool_calls.name: query_aas_graph

args.cypher:
// Check Nameplate submodels for location-related properties on AGV instances
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['MiR100_001', 'MiR250_001', 'MiR250_002']
AND sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE toLower(p.idShort) CONTAINS 'location' OR toLower(p.idShort) CONTAINS 'hall' OR toLower(p.idShort) CONTAINS 'area' OR toLower(p.idShort) CONTAINS 'zone'
RETURN aas.idShort, p.idShort, p.value

args.name: Digital nameplate

args.cypher:
// Get UniqueFacilityIdentifier from Nameplate submodels of AGV instances
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['MiR100_001', 'MiR250_001', 'MiR250_002']
AND sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property {idShort: 'UniqueFacilityIdentifier'})
RETURN aas.idShort AS instanceIdShort, p.value AS uniqueFacilityIdentifier

// Find all FacilityInformation submodels and their parent shells
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm)
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, sm.idShort, sm.id

// Get all properties and elements from FacilityInformation submodels
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el)
WHERE el:Property OR el:SubmodelElementCollection
RETURN sm.idShort AS submodelIdShort, el.idShort AS elementIdShort, labels(el) AS types, el.value AS value
ORDER BY submodelIdShort, elementIdShort

// List all AAS shells
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, aas.category
ORDER BY aas.idShort

// List all submodels on Hall3 and Hall4 shells
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['Hall3', 'Hall4']
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort AS hallIdShort, sm.idShort AS submodelIdShort, sc.id AS semanticId
ORDER BY hallIdShort, submodelIdShort

// Explore HierarchicalStructures submodels on Hall3 and Hall4 — look for Entity nodes that represent AGVs
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['Hall3', 'Hall4']
AND sm.idShort = 'HierarchicalStructures'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(e:Entity)
OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:HAS_SPECIFIC_ASSET_ID]->(sai:SpecificAssetId)
RETURN aas.idShort AS hallIdShort, e.idShort AS entityIdShort, asset.globalAssetId AS globalAssetId, sai.value AS specificAssetIdValue
ORDER BY hallIdShort, entityIdShort

// Get manufacturer and product designation from Nameplate submodels of AGV instances
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['MiR100_001', 'MiR250_001', 'MiR250_002']
AND sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(m:MultiLanguageProperty {idShort: 'ManufacturerName'})
MATCH (m)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(val:LangString {language: 'en'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(mp:MultiLanguageProperty {idShort: 'ManufacturerProductDesignation'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (mp)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(pval:LangString {language: 'en'})
RETURN aas.idShort AS instanceIdShort, val.text AS manufacturer, pval.text AS productDesignation

// Get manufacturer and product designation from Nameplate submodels of AGV instances
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['MiR100_001', 'MiR250_001', 'MiR250_002']
AND sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(m:MultiLanguageProperty {idShort: 'ManufacturerName'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (m)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(val:LangString)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(mp:MultiLanguageProperty {idShort: 'ManufacturerProductDesignation'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (mp)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(pval:LangString)
RETURN aas.idShort AS instanceIdShort, val.text AS manufacturer, pval.text AS productDesignation

// Get manufacturer and product info from AGV technical data on type shells
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['MiR100_Type', 'MiR250_Type']
AND sm.idShort = 'TechnicalDataAGV'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property {idShort: 'ManufacturerName'})
RETURN aas.idShort AS typeIdShort, p.value AS manufacturerName

// List submodels on type shells
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['MiR100_Type', 'MiR250_Type']
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort AS typeIdShort, sm.idShort AS submodelIdShort, sm.id AS submodelId, sc.id AS semanticId

// Get manufacturer from Nameplate on type shells
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['MiR100_Type', 'MiR250_Type']
AND sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(m:MultiLanguageProperty {idShort: 'ManufacturerName'})
MATCH (m)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(val:LangString)
RETURN aas.idShort AS typeIdShort, val.text AS manufacturer, val.language AS lang

// Get product designation from Nameplate on type shells
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['MiR100_Type', 'MiR250_Type']
AND sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(m:MultiLanguageProperty {idShort: 'ManufacturerProductDesignation'})
MATCH (m)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(val:LangString {language: 'en'})
RETURN aas.idShort AS typeIdShort, val.text AS productDesignation

// Find all submodels conforming to the AGV technical data template

MATCH (instance)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
RETURN instance.idShort AS instanceIdShort, instance.id AS instanceId, type.idShort AS typeIdShort, asset.globalAssetId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)

OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort AS aasIdShort, sm.idShort AS smIdShort, sm.id AS smId, sc.id AS semanticId

args.cypher:
// Check all submodels across all AAS shells for any Asset Location template
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/smt/assetlocation/1/0'})
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm)
RETURN aas.idShort AS aasIdShort, aas.id AS aasId, sm.idShort AS smIdShort, sm.id AS smId

// Find all AAS with Hierarchical Structures submodels
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/HierarchicalStructures/1/1/Submodel'})
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm)
RETURN aas.idShort AS aasIdShort, aas.id AS aasId, sm.idShort AS smIdShort, sm.id AS smId

// Find all AAS with Facility Information submodels
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm)
RETURN aas.idShort AS aasIdShort, aas.id AS aasId, sm.idShort AS smIdShort, sm.id AS smId

args.name: FacilityInformation

args.cypher:
// Get all elements from the Facility Information submodels
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE sm.id IN ['urn:submodel:hall4:facilityinformation', 'urn:submodel:hall3:facilityinformation']
RETURN sm.idShort AS smIdShort, el.idShort AS elIdShort, labels(el) AS types, el.value AS value

// List all submodels of Hall3 and Hall4
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['Hall3', 'Hall4']
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort AS hallIdShort, sm.idShort AS smIdShort, sm.id AS smId, sc.id AS semanticId

// Traverse the Hierarchical Structures submodels to find contained assets
MATCH (hall:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE hall.idShort IN ['Hall3', 'Hall4'] AND sm.idShort = 'HierarchicalStructures'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(entity:Entity)
OPTIONAL MATCH (entity)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
OPTIONAL MATCH (entity)-[:HAS_SPECIFIC_ASSET_ID]->(sai:SpecificAssetId)
RETURN hall.idShort AS hallIdShort, entity.idShort AS entityIdShort, asset.globalAssetId AS globalAssetId, sai.value AS specificAssetId

// Get nameplate manufacturer and model info for AGV instances
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.id IN ['urn:aas:mir100:001', 'urn:aas:mir250:001', 'urn:aas:mir250:002']
AND sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['Manufacturer', 'Model', 'Type']
RETURN aas.idShort AS aasIdShort, p.idShort AS propName, p.value AS propValue

// Get all properties from the Nameplate submodels of AGV instances
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.id IN ['urn:aas:mir100:001', 'urn:aas:mir250:001', 'urn:aas:mir250:002']
AND sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:Property)
RETURN aas.idShort AS aasIdShort, el.idShort AS propName, el.value AS propValue

// Get AGV technical data - manufacturer and model from type shells
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/SubmodelTemplate/technicaldataagv/1/0'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['ManufacturerName', 'AgvClass', 'AgvKinematic', 'MaxLoadMass']
RETURN sm.smId AS smId, p.idShort AS propName, p.value AS propValue

args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort IS NOT NULL
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort AS shellIdShort, aas.id AS shellId, sm.idShort AS submodelIdShort, sm.id AS submodelId, sc.id AS semanticId
ORDER BY aas.idShort, sm.idShort

// Get nameplate info for all AGV instances
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['MiR100_001', 'MiR250_001', 'MiR250_002']
AND sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(np:Property)
WHERE np.idShort IN ['manufacturer', 'model', 'serialNumber', 'productName', 'productNumber']
RETURN aas.idShort AS robot, np.idShort AS property, np.value AS value
ORDER BY robot, property

args.name: Digital nameplate

args.cypher:
// Get nameplate info for AGV instances
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: $robotIdShort})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'Nameplate'})
MATCH path = (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['ManufacturerProductType', 'SerialNumber', 'OrderCodeOfManufacturer', 'UniqueFacilityIdentifier']
RETURN aas.idShort AS robot, p.idShort AS property, p.value AS value
ORDER BY robot, property

// Get nameplate info for all AGV instances
UNWIND ['MiR100_001', 'MiR250_001', 'MiR250_002'] AS robotIdShort
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: robotIdShort})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'Nameplate'})
MATCH path = (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['ManufacturerProductType', 'SerialNumber', 'OrderCodeOfManufacturer', 'UniqueFacilityIdentifier', 'HardwareVersion', 'SoftwareVersion']
RETURN aas.idShort AS robot, p.idShort AS property, p.value AS value
ORDER BY robot, property

args.name: Technical Data for Automated Guided Vehicles

args.cypher:
// Get manufacturer and product designation from AGV Type shells
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: $typeIdShort})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'TechnicalDataAGV'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['ManufacturerName', 'ProductArticleNumberOfManufacturer', 'ManufacturerOrderCode']
RETURN aas.idShort AS typeShell, p.idShort AS property, p.value AS value

// Get manufacturer and product info from MiR250 Type shell
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: $typeIdShort})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'TechnicalDataAGV'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['ManufacturerName', 'ProductArticleNumberOfManufacturer', 'ManufacturerOrderCode', 'MaxLoadMass', 'VehicleLength', 'VehicleWidth', 'VehicleWeight']
RETURN aas.idShort AS typeShell, p.idShort AS property, p.value AS value

args.name: Hierarchical Structures enabling Bills of Material

args.cypher:
// Find all entities in hierarchical structures that reference AGV assets
MATCH (hall:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'HierarchicalStructures' AND hall.idShort IN ['Hall3', 'Hall4']
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(e:Entity)
OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:HAS_SPECIFIC_ASSET_ID]->(sai:SpecificAssetId)
RETURN hall.idShort AS hall, e.idShort AS entityId, a.globalAssetId AS globalAssetId, sai.value AS specificAssetId
ORDER BY hall, entityId

// Check if MiR100_Type has TechnicalDataAGV submodel
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'MiR100_Type'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort AS submodel, sc.id AS semanticId

// Get MiR100 technical data
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'MiR100_Type'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'TechnicalDataAGV'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['ProductArticleNumberOfManufacturer', 'ManufacturerOrderCode', 'MaxLoadMass', 'VehicleLength', 'VehicleWidth', 'VehicleWeight']
RETURN p.idShort AS property, p.value AS value

// Get facility info for Hall3 and Hall4
MATCH (hall:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: $hallId})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'FacilityInformation'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['hallName', 'area', 'primaryUse']
RETURN hall.idShort AS hall, p.idShort AS property, p.value AS value

args.name: FacilityInformation

args.cypher:
// Get facility info for Hall3 and Hall4
UNWIND ['Hall3', 'Hall4'] AS hallId
MATCH (hall:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: hallId})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'FacilityInformation'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['Area', 'PowerConnection']
RETURN hall.idShort AS hall, p.idShort AS property, p.value AS value
ORDER BY hall, property

records.query: Which autonomous transport robots do we have and where are they located?

result.query: Which autonomous transport robots do we have and where are they located?
result.response:
I'll find the autonomous transport robots and their locations by querying the AAS graph.









Now let me get the templates index to find the relevant semantic IDs for autonomous transport robots and locations.









I found the relevant templates:
- **Technical Data for Automated Guided Vehicles** (`https://admin-shell.io/idta/SubmodelTemplate/technicaldataagv/1/0`) — present in the graph
- **Data Model for Asset Location** (`https://admin-shell.io/idta/smt/assetlocation/1/0`) — for locations
- **FacilityInformation** (`https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0`) — for facility/hall info

Let me now find all AAS that have the AGV technical data submodel, and then resolve their locations.









Syntax error — need spaces around the relationship pattern. Let me fix:









The issue is with the URL in the pattern. Let me use a parameter instead:









I found two **type** shells (MiR100_Type and MiR250_Type). These are the templates/types. Now I need to find the **instance** shells derived from these types — those are the actual robots in use.









I found 3 autonomous transport robots:
1. **MiR100_001** (MiR100 type)
2. **MiR250_001** (MiR250 type)
3. **MiR250_002** (MiR250 type)

Now I need to find their locations. Let me check if these instance shells have a location submodel or if location info is stored elsewhere.









No location submodel directly on the instance shell. Let me check if there's a HierarchicalStructures submodel or if the robots are listed as contained assets in a facility/zone submodel.









Let me check what semanticIds actually exist in the graph, particularly looking for location-related ones:









Good. I can see there's a HierarchicalStructures submodel in the graph. Let me find which AAS has it and explore its content:









The note says the trailing `/Submodel` suffix was stripped. Let me try without it:









Hmm, let me check the FacilityInformation submodel — that might contain location info:









Found two halls. Now let me explore the FacilityInformation submodel structure and look for references to the robots. Let me also check the template structure:









The FacilityInformation template doesn't directly reference robots. Let me look at the HierarchicalStructures submodel more carefully — the semanticId listed in the graph was `https://admin-shell.io/idta/HierarchicalStructures/1/1/Submodel`. Let me check all submodels across all AAS to find where the robots might be referenced:









Both Hall3 and Hall4 have HierarchicalStructures submodels. These likely contain the robots as child entities. Let me explore the HierarchicalStructures submodel template and then traverse the content:









Now let me traverse the HierarchicalStructures submodel of Hall3 and Hall4 to find the robots and their location references:









The WHERE clause with relationship patterns doesn't work well. Let me use a different approach — use the submodel ID directly:









Excellent! Hall3 contains MiR250_001 and MiR250_002. Now let me check Hall4:









Now let me get the FacilityInformation details for both halls to provide context about the locations:

















Let me also get the PrimaryUse for both halls:

















Here's the summary:

**We have 3 autonomous transport robots (AGVs):**

| Robot | Type | Location | Hall |
|-------|------|----------|------|
| **MiR100_001** | MiR100 | Hall 4 (Logistics, 12,000 m²) | urn:aas:hall4 |
| **MiR250_001** | MiR250 | Hall 3 (Assembly, 8,000 m²) | urn:aas:hall3 |
| **MiR250_002** | MiR250 | Hall 3 (Assembly, 8,000 m²) | urn:aas:hall3 |

According to the graph data, the locations are tracked via HierarchicalStructures submodels on the facility shells. Hall 3 is an assembly area and Hall 4 is a logistics area.

Note: MiR100_001 currently has an open service request notification — if you need details about that, just ask.

MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
RETURN p.idShort, p.value

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_DISPLAY_NAME]->(dn:LangString)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['Hall3', 'Hall4']
RETURN aas.idShort, dn.language, dn.text

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.id IN ['urn:aas:mir100:type', 'urn:aas:mir250:type']
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort = 'ManufacturerName'
RETURN aas.idShort, p.idShort, p.value

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'MiR100_Type'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'TechnicalDataAGV'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort = 'ManufacturerName'
RETURN p.idShort, p.value

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'MiR100_Type'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'TechnicalDataAGV'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE el.idShortPath CONTAINS 'Manufacturer'
RETURN el.idShort, el.idShortPath, labels(el) AS types, el.value
LIMIT 10

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'MiR100_Type'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'TechnicalDataAGV'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(mlp:MultiLanguageProperty {idShort: 'ManufacturerName'})
MATCH (mlp)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(val:LangString)
RETURN mlp.idShort, val.language, val.text

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'MiR250_Type'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'TechnicalDataAGV'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(mlp:MultiLanguageProperty {idShort: 'ManufacturerName'})
MATCH (mlp)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(val:LangString)
WHERE val.language = 'en'
RETURN mlp.idShort, val.language, val.text

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'TechnicalDataAGV'})
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['MiR100_Type', 'MiR250_Type']
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property {idShort: 'MaxLoadMass'})
RETURN aas.idShort, p.idShort, p.value

The templates index showed `graphSemanticIds` for HierarchicalStructures as `["https://admin-shell.io/idta/HierarchicalStructures/1/1/Submodel"]`, but the query returned nothing. Let me check all submodels and their semanticIds more broadly:

**Autonomous Transport Robots (AGVs):**

args.cypher:
// Find submodels conforming to the AGV template
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/SubmodelTemplate/technicaldataagv/1/0'})
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm)
MATCH (aas)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
RETURN aas.idShort AS robotName, aas.id AS aasId, sm.idShort AS submodelIdShort, sm.id AS submodelId, a.globalAssetId

// Find instance shells derived from the AGV type shells
MATCH (instance:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:DERIVED_FROM]->(type:AssetAdministrationShell)
WHERE type.idShort IN ['MiR100_Type', 'MiR250_Type']
RETURN instance.idShort AS instanceName, instance.id AS instanceId, type.idShort AS typeName

args.name: Technical Data for Automated Guided Vehicles

args.cypher:
// Get key properties from instance AGV submodels
MATCH (instance:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE instance.id IN ['urn:aas:mir100:001', 'urn:aas:mir250:001', 'urn:aas:mir250:002']
AND (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/SubmodelTemplate/technicaldataagv/1/0'})

MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['ManufacturerName', 'AgvClass', 'MaxLoadMass', 'SpeedMaxEmptyAsSpecified', 'VehicleLength', 'VehicleWidth', 'VehicleWeight']
RETURN instance.idShort AS robotName, p.idShort AS propName, p.value AS propValue
ORDER BY robotName, propName

// List all submodels of the instance shells
MATCH (instance:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE instance.id IN ['urn:aas:mir100:001', 'urn:aas:mir250:001', 'urn:aas:mir250:002']
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN instance.idShort AS robotName, sm.idShort AS submodelIdShort, sm.id AS submodelId, sc.id AS semanticId
ORDER BY robotName, submodelIdShort

// Get key properties from the TYPE AGV submodels (shared specs)
MATCH (type:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE type.idShort IN ['MiR100_Type', 'MiR250_Type']
AND (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/SubmodelTemplate/technicaldataagv/1/0'})

MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['ManufacturerName', 'AgvClass', 'AgvKinematic', 'MaxLoadMass', 'SpeedMaxEmptyAsSpecified', 'VehicleLength', 'VehicleWidth', 'VehicleWeight', 'LocalizationType', 'NavigationType', 'EnergySource']
RETURN type.idShort AS robotType, p.idShort AS propName, p.value AS propValue
ORDER BY robotType, propName

tool_calls.name: query_aas_graph

args.cypher:
// Search for any location-related submodels across all shells
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
WHERE sc.id IS NOT NULL AND toLower(sc.id) CONTAINS 'location'
RETURN aas.idShort AS robotName, sm.idShort AS submodelIdShort, sm.id AS submodelId, sc.id AS semanticId

tool_calls.result_preview: {"error":"forbidden_pattern","violations":[{"rule":"toLower_id_contains","hint":"Use exact match instead: WHERE aas.idShort = 'ExactName'. See cypher.md anti-pattern #4.","match":"toLower(sc.id) CONTA

args.cypher:
// List all semanticIds used by submodels to find location-related ones
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN DISTINCT sc.id AS semanticId
ORDER BY semanticId

// Find FacilityInformation submodels and their properties
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
RETURN aas.idShort AS facilityName, p.idShort AS propName, p.value AS propValue
ORDER BY facilityName, propName

args.name: Hierarchical Structures enabling Bills of Material

args.cypher:
// Find HierarchicalStructures submodels and their parent AAS
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/HierarchicalStructures/1/1/Submodel'})
RETURN aas.idShort AS parentAAS, aas.id AS parentAasId, sm.idShort AS smIdShort, sm.id AS smId

// Find submodels with hierarchical structures semanticId (check graphSemanticIds)
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
WHERE sc.id = 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/HierarchicalStructures/1/1'
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm)
RETURN aas.idShort AS parentAAS, sm.idShort AS smIdShort, sm.id AS smId

// List ALL submodels with their semanticIds and parent AAS
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort AS parentAAS, sm.idShort AS smIdShort, sc.id AS semanticId
ORDER BY parentAAS, smIdShort

// Query HierarchicalStructures in Hall3 to find contained assets
MATCH (hall:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall3'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/HierarchicalStructures/1/1/Submodel'})

// Traverse the hierarchy to find entities and their relationships
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(e:Entity)
OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(rel:RelationshipElement)
OPTIONAL MATCH (rel)-[:HAS_FIRST]->(first)
OPTIONAL MATCH (rel)-[:HAS_SECOND]->(second)

RETURN e.idShort AS entityId, e.idShortPath AS path, a.globalAssetId AS assetId, rel.idShort AS relType, labels(first) AS firstLabels, labels(second) AS secondLabels

// Query HierarchicalStructures submodel in Hall3 by idShort
MATCH (hall:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall3'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'HierarchicalStructures'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*1..3]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN el.idShort AS idShort, el.idShortPath AS path, labels(el) AS types

// Query HierarchicalStructures submodel in Hall4 by idShort
MATCH (hall:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'HierarchicalStructures'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*1..3]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN el.idShort AS idShort, el.idShortPath AS path, labels(el) AS types

// Get facility details for Hall3 and Hall4
MATCH (hall:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE hall.idShort IN ['Hall3', 'Hall4']
AND (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
RETURN hall.idShort AS hall, p.idShort AS propName, p.value AS propValue
ORDER BY hall, propName

## Autonomous Transport Robots (AGVs)

args.cypher:
// Find all AAS that have a submodel conforming to the AGV template
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'TechnicalDataAGV'
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, sm.idShort, sm.id

// Find all instance shells derived from AGV type shells
MATCH (instance:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:DERIVED_FROM]->(type:AssetAdministrationShell)
WHERE type.idShort IN ['MiR100_Type', 'MiR250_Type']
RETURN instance.idShort, instance.id, type.idShort AS typeShell

// List all submodels for each AGV instance to find location information
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['MiR100_001', 'MiR250_001', 'MiR250_002']
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort AS agvName, sm.idShort AS submodel, sm.id AS submodelId, sc.id AS semanticId
ORDER BY agvName, submodel

tool_calls.name: query_aas_graph

args.cypher:
// Check for any submodels related to location across all shells
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE toLower(sm.idShort) CONTAINS 'location' OR toLower(sm.idShort) CONTAINS 'position'
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort, sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS semanticId

tool_calls.result_preview: {"error":"forbidden_pattern","violations":[{"rule":"toLower_id_contains","hint":"Use exact match instead: WHERE aas.idShort = 'ExactName'. See cypher.md anti-pattern #4.","match":"toLower(sm.idShort)

args.cypher:
// Find all FacilityInformation submodels to understand the facility structure
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, sm.idShort, sm.id

args.name: Digital nameplate

args.cypher:
// Get UniqueFacilityIdentifier from Nameplate submodels of AGV instances
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['MiR100_001', 'MiR250_001', 'MiR250_002']
AND sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property {idShort: 'UniqueFacilityIdentifier'})
RETURN aas.idShort AS agvName, p.value AS facilityIdentifier

// Get all properties from Nameplate submodels of AGV instances
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['MiR100_001', 'MiR250_001', 'MiR250_002']
AND sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.value IS NOT NULL AND p.value <> ''
RETURN aas.idShort AS agvName, p.idShort, p.value
ORDER BY agvName, p.idShort

args.name: FacilityInformation

args.cypher:
// Get FacilityInformation details for both halls
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['Hall3', 'Hall4']
AND sm.idShort = 'FacilityInformation'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE el:idShort IS NOT NULL
RETURN aas.idShort AS hall, el.idShort, labels(el) AS types

// Get actual values from FacilityInformation submodels
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['Hall3', 'Hall4']
AND sm.idShort = 'FacilityInformation'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.value IS NOT NULL AND p.value <> ''
RETURN aas.idShort AS hall, p.idShort, p.value
ORDER BY hall, p.idShort

// Get PrimaryUse (MultiLanguageProperty) values from FacilityInformation
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['Hall3', 'Hall4']
AND sm.idShort = 'FacilityInformation'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(mlp:MultiLanguageProperty {idShort: 'PrimaryUse'})
MATCH (mlp)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(ls:LangString)
RETURN aas.idShort AS hall, ls.language, ls.text
ORDER BY hall

// List all submodels in Hall3 and Hall4 to find potential AGV references
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['Hall3', 'Hall4']
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort AS hall, sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS semanticId
ORDER BY hall, sm.idShort

// Look for AGV references in HierarchicalStructures of halls
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['Hall3', 'Hall4']
AND sm.idShort = 'HierarchicalStructures'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(ref:ReferenceElement)
OPTIONAL MATCH (ref)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(target)
RETURN aas.idShort AS hall, ref.idShort, ref.smId, target.id AS targetId, target.idShort AS targetIdShort

// Let's see all elements in HierarchicalStructures submodels
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['Hall3', 'Hall4']
AND sm.idShort = 'HierarchicalStructures'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN aas.idShort AS hall, el.idShort, labels(el) AS types, el.smId
ORDER BY hall, el.idShort
LIMIT 50

// Get technical data from AGV type shells
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['MiR100_Type', 'MiR250_Type']
AND sm.idShort = 'TechnicalDataAGV'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.value IS NOT NULL AND p.value <> ''
RETURN aas.idShort AS agvType, p.idShort, p.value
ORDER BY agvType, p.idShort

args.cypher:
// Find all submodels conforming to the AGV technical data template
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/SubmodelTemplate/technicaldataagv/1/0'})
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm)
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
RETURN aas.idShort AS aasName, aas.id AS aasId, a.globalAssetId AS globalAssetId, a.assetType AS assetType

// Find all instance shells derived from AGV type shells
MATCH (instance:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:DERIVED_FROM]->(type:AssetAdministrationShell)
WHERE type.idShort IN ['MiR100_Type', 'MiR250_Type']
MATCH (instance)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
RETURN instance.idShort AS instanceName, instance.id AS instanceId, type.idShort AS typeName, a.globalAssetId AS globalAssetId

// List submodels of each AGV instance with their semanticIds
MATCH (instance:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE instance.id IN ['urn:aas:mir100:001', 'urn:aas:mir250:001', 'urn:aas:mir250:002']
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN instance.idShort AS instanceName, sm.idShort AS smName, sm.id AS smId, sc.id AS semanticId

args.name: Digital nameplate
Technical Data for Automated Guided Vehicles

args.cypher:
// Get UniqueFacilityIdentifier from Nameplate submodels of AGV instances
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.id IN ['urn:aas:mir100:001', 'urn:aas:mir250:001', 'urn:aas:mir250:002']
AND (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property {idShort: 'UniqueFacilityIdentifier'})
RETURN aas.idShort AS robotName, p.value AS facilityId

// Check all properties in Nameplate submodels for AGV instances
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.id IN ['urn:aas:mir100:001', 'urn:aas:mir250:001', 'urn:aas:mir250:002']
AND (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.value IS NOT NULL AND p.value <> ''
RETURN aas.idShort AS robotName, p.idShort AS propName, p.value AS propValue
ORDER BY aas.idShort, p.idShort

// Find all FacilityInformation submodels and their properties
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm)
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.value IS NOT NULL AND p.value <> ''
RETURN aas.idShort AS facilityName, sm.idShort AS smName, p.idShort AS propName, p.value AS propValue
ORDER BY aas.idShort, p.idShort

// Find all submodels with Hierarchical Structures template and their contents
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/HierarchicalStructures/1/1/Submodel'})
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm)
RETURN aas.idShort AS aasName, sm.idShort AS smName, sm.id AS smId

tool_calls.name: query_aas_graph

args.cypher:
// Find all submodels with Hierarchical Structures template - check exact semanticId in graph
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
WHERE sc.id CONTAINS 'HierarchicalStructures'
RETURN sm.idShort AS smName, sc.id AS semanticId, sm.id AS smId

tool_calls.result_preview: {"error":"forbidden_pattern","violations":[{"rule":"id_contains_or_regex","hint":"Use exact match instead: WHERE aas.id = 'urn:...'. See cypher.md anti-pattern #4.","match":"sc.id CONTAINS"}],"hint":"

args.cypher:
// Find all submodels with Hierarchical Structures template - list all semanticIds
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN DISTINCT sc.id AS semanticId
ORDER BY sc.id

// Find submodels with Hierarchical Structures template
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/HierarchicalStructures/1/1/Submodel'})
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm)
RETURN aas.idShort AS aasName, sm.idShort AS smName, sm.id AS smId

// Find submodels with Hierarchical Structures template - without /Submodel suffix
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/HierarchicalStructures/1/1'})
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm)
RETURN aas.idShort AS aasName, sm.idShort AS smName, sm.id AS smId

// List all submodels with their semanticIds
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm)
RETURN aas.idShort AS aasName, sm.idShort AS smName, sc.id AS semanticId
ORDER BY aas.idShort, sm.idShort

// Explore the HierarchicalStructures submodel of Hall3 to find contained assets
MATCH (hall:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall3'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/HierarchicalStructures/1/1/Submodel'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE el.idShort IS NOT NULL
RETURN sm.id AS smId, el.idShort AS elementIdShort, labels(el) AS types, el.smId AS elementSmId
ORDER BY el.idShort

// Explore the HierarchicalStructures submodel of Hall3 - without /Submodel suffix
MATCH (hall:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall3'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'HierarchicalStructures'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE el.idShort IS NOT NULL
RETURN sm.id AS smId, el.idShort AS elementIdShort, labels(el) AS types, el.smId AS elementSmId
ORDER BY el.idShort

// Explore the HierarchicalStructures submodel of Hall4
MATCH (hall:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'HierarchicalStructures'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE el.idShort IS NOT NULL
RETURN sm.id AS smId, el.idShort AS elementIdShort, labels(el) AS types, el.smId AS elementSmId
ORDER BY el.idShort

// Get AGV type information from the TechnicalDataAGV submodels on the type shells
MATCH (typeAAS:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'TechnicalDataAGV'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort = 'ManufacturerName' AND p.value IS NOT NULL AND p.value <> ''
RETURN typeAAS.idShort AS typeName, p.value AS manufacturer

// List all properties in TechnicalDataAGV submodels
MATCH (typeAAS:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'TechnicalDataAGV'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.value IS NOT NULL AND p.value <> ''
RETURN typeAAS.idShort AS typeName, p.idShort AS propName, p.value AS propValue
ORDER BY typeAAS.idShort, p.idShort

args.cypher:
// Find all submodels conforming to the AGV technical data template
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/SubmodelTemplate/technicaldataagv/1/0'})
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm)
RETURN aas.idShort AS aasIdShort, aas.id AS aasId, sm.idShort AS smIdShort, sm.id AS smId

// Find all instance shells derived from the AGV type shells
MATCH (instance:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:DERIVED_FROM]->(type:AssetAdministrationShell)
WHERE type.id IN ['urn:aas:mir100:type', 'urn:aas:mir250:type']
RETURN instance.idShort AS instanceIdShort, instance.id AS instanceId, type.idShort AS typeIdShort

args.name: Technical Data for Automated Guided Vehicles

args.cypher:
// List all submodels for each AGV instance shell, with their semanticIds
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: $aasId})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort AS smIdShort, sm.id AS smId, sc.id AS templateSemanticId

// List all submodels for MiR250_001 and MiR250_002
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.id IN ['urn:aas:mir250:001', 'urn:aas:mir250:002']
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort AS aasIdShort, sm.idShort AS smIdShort, sm.id AS smId, sc.id AS templateSemanticId

// Check for any FacilityInformation submodels in the environment
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm)
RETURN aas.idShort AS aasIdShort, aas.id AS aasId, sm.idShort AS smIdShort, sm.id AS smId

// Check for Asset Location submodels (for tracking AGV locations)
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/smt/assetlocation/1/0'})
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm)
RETURN aas.idShort AS aasIdShort, aas.id AS aasId, sm.idShort AS smIdShort, sm.id AS smId

args.name: FacilityInformation

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: $smId})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(mlp:MultiLanguageProperty)
WHERE mlp.idShort = 'PrimaryUse'

RETURN mlp.idShort, ls.language, ls.text

// Check PrimaryUse for Hall4
MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: $smId})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(mlp:MultiLanguageProperty)
WHERE mlp.idShort = 'PrimaryUse'
MATCH (mlp)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(ls:LangString)
RETURN mlp.idShort, ls.language, ls.text

// Check for HierarchicalStructures submodels that might link AGVs to halls
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/HierarchicalStructures/1/1/Submodel'})
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm)
RETURN aas.idShort AS aasIdShort, aas.id AS aasId, sm.idShort AS smIdShort, sm.id AS smId

tool_calls.name: query_aas_graph

args.cypher:
// Search for any property containing "location" or "hall" in idShort across AGV instance submodels
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.id IN ['urn:aas:mir100:001', 'urn:aas:mir250:001', 'urn:aas:mir250:002']
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE toLower(el.idShort) CONTAINS 'location' OR toLower(el.idShort) CONTAINS 'hall' OR toLower(el.idShort) CONTAINS 'area'

// Check if there are any relationships between AGV shells and Hall shells

LIMIT 20

tool_calls.result_preview:
# Cypher patterns and anti-patterns

tool_calls.name: get_graph_schema
tool_calls.result_preview:
# AAS Graph Schema

All nodes also carry the label `GraphNode`.

## Core Nodes

### AssetAdministrationShell
The top-level AAS entity.
- Labels: AssetAdministrationShell, Identifiable, Referable, Refe

args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/SubmodelTemplate/technicaldataagv/1/0'})
RETURN aas.idShort AS robotName, aas.id AS aasId, sm.idShort AS smIdShort, sm.id AS smId

MATCH (instance:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:DERIVED_FROM]->(type:AssetAdministrationShell)
WHERE type.id IN ['urn:aas:mir100:type', 'urn:aas:mir250:type']
RETURN instance.idShort AS instanceName, instance.id AS instanceId, type.idShort AS typeName

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: $aasId})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort AS smIdShort, sm.id AS smId, sc.id AS templateSemanticId

args.name: Technical Data for Automated Guided Vehicles

args.cypher:

WHERE aas.id IN ['urn:aas:mir100:001', 'urn:aas:mir250:001', 'urn:aas:mir250:002']
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort AS robotName, sm.idShort AS smIdShort, sc.id AS templateSemanticId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/HierarchicalStructures/1/1/Submodel'})
RETURN aas.idShort AS hallName, aas.id AS aasId, sm.idShort AS smIdShort, sm.id AS smId

args.cypher:

WHERE sc.id CONTAINS 'Hierarchical' OR sc.id CONTAINS 'hierarchical' OR sc.id CONTAINS 'facility' OR sc.id CONTAINS 'Facility' OR sc.id CONTAINS 'location' OR sc.id CONTAINS 'Location'
RETURN DISTINCT sc.id

RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, sm.idShort, sm.id

RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id

MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/HierarchicalStructures/1/1'})

RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id

WHERE sc.id STARTS WITH 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/Hierarchical'
RETURN sc.id

WHERE (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})

args.name: Hierarchical Structures enabling Bills of Material

args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/HierarchicalStructures/1/1/Submodel'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(entry:Entity)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(node:Entity)
MATCH (node)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(rel:RelationshipElement)
WHERE rel.idShort = 'HasPart'
MATCH (rel)-[:HAS_SECOND]->(second)
RETURN aas.idShort AS hallName, entry.idShort AS entryNode, node.idShort AS parentNode, second AS hasPartTarget

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:hall3'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'HierarchicalStructures'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sc.id

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall3:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el)
WHERE el:idShortPath IS NOT NULL
RETURN el.idShort, el.idShortPath, labels(el) AS types, el.entityType AS entityType

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el)
WHERE el:idShortPath IS NOT NULL
RETURN el.idShort, el.idShortPath, labels(el) AS types

args.name: FacilityInformation

args.cypher:
MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall3:facilityinformation'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
RETURN p.idShort, p.value, p.valueType

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:facilityinformation'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
RETURN p.idShort, p.value, p.valueType

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall3:facilityinformation'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(mlp:MultiLanguageProperty)
MATCH (mlp)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(lv:LangString)
WHERE mlp.idShort = 'PrimaryUse'
RETURN mlp.idShort, lv.language, lv.text

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:facilityinformation'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(mlp:MultiLanguageProperty)
MATCH (mlp)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(lv:LangString)
WHERE mlp.idShort = 'PrimaryUse'
RETURN mlp.idShort, lv.language, lv.text

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:mir100:type:technicaldataagv'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort = 'ManufacturerName'
RETURN p.idShort, p.value

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:mir100:type:technicaldataagv'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
RETURN p.idShort, p.value, p.idShortPath

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:mir250:type:technicaldataagv'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['ProductArticleNumberOfManufacturer', 'ManufacturerOrderCode', 'AgvClass', 'MaxLoadMass', 'NavigationType', 'VehicleLength', 'VehicleWidth', 'VehicleWeight']
RETURN p.idShort, p.value

records.query: What does the operator manual of the mir 250 say about emergency stops?

result.query: What does the operator manual of the mir 250 say about emergency stops?
result.response:
I'll help you find information about emergency stops in the MIR 250 operator manual. Let me start by locating the asset and its documentation.









Let me first get the manual page and templates index as required, then search for the MIR 250 asset properly.

















Now let me find all AAS shells to identify the MIR 250.









Found the MIR 250. There's a type shell (`MiR250_Type`) and two instances. The operator manual/documentation typically lives on the type shell. Let me find PDF files associated with it.









Found a PDF file. Now let me search the document for information about emergency stops.









Let me also search for more specific information about the emergency stop functionality itself.









I now have comprehensive information from the MIR 250 operator manual about emergency stops. Here's what the manual says:

---

## Emergency Stop — MIR 250 Operator Manual

**Use**
- **Only press the Emergency stop buttons in emergency situations.** They are not designed for frequent use. — [Manual p. 85](http://localhost:8091/submodels/dXJuOnN1Ym9kZWw6bWlyMjUwOnR5cGU6aGFuZG92ZXJkb2N1bWVudGF0aW9u/submodel-elements/Documents%5B0%5D.DocumentVersions%5B0%5D.DigitalFiles%5B0%5D/attachment#page=85)

**Emergency stop circuit (Section 7.15)**
- The emergency stop circuit runs through the **Auxiliary emergency stop interface** and uses external input to bring the robot into an emergency stop.
- The interface has two output pins (providing a 24 V signal) and two input pins (to trigger the emergency stop).
- The 24 V signal from the safety PLC outputs passes through all Emergency stop buttons on the top module, then continues to the two input pins.
- **When both input pins receive 24 V, the robot can operate.**
- Connected Emergency stop buttons must **break the circuit** when pressed, so both inputs receive 0 V, which brings the robot into Emergency stop.
- If the circuit or an Emergency stop button is installed incorrectly and the input signals are not the same, the robot enters **Protective stop** until the circuit is fixed. — [Manual p. 94](http://localhost:8091/submodels/dXJuOnN1Ym9kZWw6bWlyMjUwOnR5cGU6aGFuZG92ZXJkb2N1bWVudGF0aW9u/submodel-elements/Documents%5B0%5D.DocumentVersions%5B0%5D.DigitalFiles%5B0%5D/attachment#page=94)

**Pin assignments (Safety interface A)**
- **Pin 3** — Shared emergency stop in 1: Inactive = robot goes into emergency stop.
- **Pin 6** — Shared emergency stop out 1: Inactive when the robot is in emergency stop. — [Manual p. 205](http://localhost:8091/submodels/dXJuOnN1Ym9kZWw6bWlyMjUwOnR5cGU6aGFuZG92ZXJkb2N1bWVudGF0aW9u/submodel-elements/Documents%5B0%5D.DocumentVersions%5B0%5D.DigitalFiles%5B0%5D/attachment#page=205)

**After an emergency stop**
- The robot's LED shows **blinking blue** — meaning the robot is waiting for user action to **clear the Emergency stop state**. — [Manual p. 18](http://localhost:8091/submodels/dXJuOnN1Ym9kZWw6bWlyMjUwOnR5cGU6aGFuZG92ZXJkb2N1bWVudGF0aW9u/submodel-elements/Documents%5B0%5D.DocumentVersions%5B0%5D.DigitalFiles%5B0%5D/attachment#page=18)

**Diagnostics**
- When the robot enters Protective or Emergency stop due to a safety system component, sign in to the robot interface and check **Monitoring > Hardware Health > Safety system** to identify which component caused the issue. — [Manual p. 99](http://localhost:8091/submodels/dXJuOnN1Ym9kZWw6bWlyMjUwOnR5cGU6aGFuZG92ZXJkb2N1bWVudGF0aW9u/submodel-elements/Documents%5B0%5D.DocumentVersions%5B0%5D.DigitalFiles%5B0%5D/attachment#page=99)

**Maintenance**
- Under **Monitoring > Hardware health > Emergency stop**, check that the Front scanner cover and Back scanner cover status shows "Clean". — [Manual p. 178](http://localhost:8091/submodels/dXJuOnN1Ym9kZWw6bWlyMjUwOnR5cGU6aGFuZG92ZXJkb2N1bWVudGF0aW9u/submodel-elements/Documents%5B0%5D.DocumentVersions%5B0%5D.DigitalFiles%5B0%5D/attachment#page=178)

- **Only press the Emergency stop buttons in emergency situations.** They are not designed for frequent use. — [Manual p. 85](http://localhost:8091/submodels/dXJuOnN1Ym9kZWw6bWlyMjUwOnR5cGU6aGFuZG92ZXJkb2N1bWVudGF0aW9u/submodel-elements/Documents%5B0%5D.DocumentVersions%5B0%5D.DigitalFiles%5B0%5D/attachment#page=85)

- The emergency stop circuit runs through the **Auxiliary emergency stop interface** and uses external input to bring the robot into an emergency stop.
- The interface has two output pins (providing a 24 V signal) and two input pins (to trigger the emergency stop).
- The 24 V signal from the safety PLC outputs passes through all Emergency stop buttons on the top module, then continues to the two input pins.
- **When both input pins receive 24 V, the robot can operate.**
- Connected Emergency stop buttons must **break the circuit** when pressed, so both inputs receive 0 V, which brings the robot into Emergency stop.
- If the circuit or an Emergency stop button is installed incorrectly and the input signals are not the same, the robot enters **Protective stop** until the circuit is fixed. — [Manual p. 94](http://localhost:8091/submodels/dXJuOnN1Ym9kZWw6bWlyMjUwOnR5cGU6aGFuZG92ZXJkb2N1bWVudGF0aW9u/submodel-elements/Documents%5B0%5D.DocumentVersions%5B0%5D.DigitalFiles%5B0%5D/attachment#page=94)

**Pin assignments (Safety interface A)**
- **Pin 3** — Shared emergency stop in 1: Inactive = robot goes into emergency stop.
- **Pin 6** — Shared emergency stop out 1: Inactive when the robot is in emergency stop. — [Manual p. 205](http://localhost:8091/submodels/dXJuOnN1Ym9kZWw6bWlyMjUwOnR5cGU6aGFuZG92ZXJkb2N1bWVudGF0aW9u/submodel-elements/Documents%5B0%5D.DocumentVersions%5B0%5D.DigitalFiles%5B0%5D/attachment#page=205)

**Maintenance**
